userId.description: Reference to the user's ID in the authentication system.

profilePictureUrl.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

socialLinks.description: An object containing social media profile URLs.

bio.description: A short biography of the user.

portfolioUrl.description: URL of the user's portfolio or personal website.

projects.description: A list of projects the user is working on.

Username.title: Username
Username.description: A document to enforce username uniqueness.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this username.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores a single user profile information document.

/usernames/{username}.description: A collection to enforce unique usernames. The document ID is the username itself.
